meta.claim: 5-postulate (P1-P5) + A1 m_e dimensional anchor for the bare topology/exponent sub-sector, A2 alpha_2^{-1}(M_GUT) Tier-3 calibrated native-RGE boundary, and A3 measured low-energy alpha for corrected precision-comparison rows; the zero-continuous-free-parameter claim applies only to the bare topology/exponent sub-sector.

muon_g_minus_2.alpha_anchor: A3 measured low-energy alpha; bare GCT alpha remains O.19/O.5.
muon_g_minus_2.verdict_rule: WP2025 arbitration: no anomaly-gap closure; report pred_correction vs wp2025_gap and HVP-synthesis disposition
muon_g_minus_2.disposition_text: Tier 2 mechanism + Tier 3 1/5 coefficient + A3 + Tier 4 calibration-survival conjecture (HVP arbitration); Tension under WP2025; falsification conditional on long-term HVP-synthesis arbitration
muon_g_minus_2.wp2025_precision_summary: WP2025 gap (a_exp − a_SM) = +37.5×10⁻¹¹ at 0.59σ (no significant anomaly); GCT prediction overshoots the gap by ~6.7× and sits 3.34σ above SM under lattice-QCD HVP. Channel disposition: Tension under WP2025; falsification conditional on long-term HVP-synthesis arbitration (Ch08 §8.7.3 / App G / App R §R.2).
muon_g_minus_2.bmw_contingency: Tension under WP2025; falsification conditional on long-term HVP-synthesis arbitration

xrism_line_fwhm_ev.falsification: Full Protocol C package: terminal no-line non-detection at the Bulbul-level empirical-derived floor Gamma <= 2.0e-28 s^-1 in >=94 Ms equivalent stacked exposure, OR deconvolved intrinsic line-width residual W_int > 20 eV after instrument and registered kinematic/turbulence deconvolution, OR morphology failing stress-gated rho_above_sigma_crit^2 by Delta chi^2 >= 9 vs smooth rho and smooth rho^2 templates inside the numerically frozen sigma_crit = 0.53 keV cm^-3 aperture. The 26 Ms / Gamma <= 3.8e-28 s^-1 stack remains a morphology-linewidth milestone; background-limited Gamma <= 1.2e-30 s^-1 is theoretical, not operative.

imp01_pipeline_gate.prediction_w_behavior: continuous phantom-side IMP-01 curve; no literal direct crossing in the scanned window
imp01_pipeline_gate.diagnostic_cpl_target: headline_run (w0_CPL_fit, wa_CPL_fit, z_cross_CPL_fit) is a projection diagnostic, not a DESI support gate
imp01_pipeline_gate.falsification: DESI DR2 + Euclid DR1 produce a 3sigma+ CPL detection of w_0 > -1 AND w_a < 0 with no GCT-native biogenic-channel likelihood or fingerprint closure

shapley_biogenic_dipole.amplitude_basis: V7' Class-2 envelope cosmic-mean |Delta w(z=0.28)| in [2, 5] x 10^-5 (Ch14 §14.6.3) x realistic biogenic-overdensity factor delta_bio in [1, 3] at Shapley scale (Local Sheet to Laniakea)
shapley_biogenic_dipole.mechanism: Biogenic phason vacuum strain Shapley orientation
shapley_biogenic_dipole.falsification: Post-Roman successor mission (or DESI Y10+ extended spatial-mapping program) finds no dipole amplitude >= 2e-4 aligned within +/-30 deg of Shapley at > 3sigma
shapley_biogenic_dipole.experiment: Post-Roman successor (or DESI Y10+ extended spatial-w(z) mapping)

pta_l6_anisotropy.verdict_rule: IMMEDIATE ACTION — Joint Bayesian analysis of NANOGrav 15yr + PPTA DR3 + EPTA DR2 using 15-angle icosahedral mask and spherical harmonic decomposition. Positive detection: combined C_6/sigma(C_6) >= 3.0.
pta_l6_anisotropy.preregistration_status: PTA anisotropy protocol specified for external deposit

neutrino_mass_sum.falsification: Fork A canonical registered band: the phason coupling mechanism (m₁ = mₑ·φ⁻³⁶) is definitively excluded if a pre-registered CMB+BAO+LSS likelihood finds Σmν < 0.075 eV at definitive precision or Σmν > 0.15 eV. The lower edge sits deliberately above the normal-ordering oscillation floor near 0.059 eV, so the gate fires on NO-allowed values that still definitively exclude the 0.0853 eV floor; the upper edge brackets the inverted/high-mass branch. DESI 2024 Σmν < 0.072 eV and DESI DR2 Σmν < 0.064 eV are TENSION, not falsification, under this band.
neutrino_mass_sum.desi_2024_disposition: TENSION under the registered 0.075/0.15 eV band
neutrino_mass_sum.euclid_dr1_pre_registration_rule: Public pre-registration must occur before first Euclid DR1 weak-lensing power spectrum unblinding.

osf_template.b: primary analysis: Euclid weak-lensing + galaxy clustering joint analysis
osf_template.c: falsification: Σmν < 0.075 eV at definitive precision OR Σmν > 0.15 eV
osf_template.e: secondary: Σmν > 0.10 eV at 3σ keeps the biogenic-DE survival branch active; DESI 2024 <0.072 eV is tension only

nv_center_chiral_proxy.engine_config_mirror: This entry mirrors App V P.8 and Ch13 §13.3.5. The F1 decision rule is the joint Branch A + Branch B null after the required scan, controls, chirality comparison, and per-cap P_CISS acceptance.
nv_center_chiral_proxy.readout_context: T2_chiral / T2_achiral is an O.23/O.24 peak-amplitude readout context, not the Protocol A-Prime falsification threshold.
nv_center_chiral_proxy.per_cap_P_CISS_requirement: P_CISS^net measured pre-unblinding on each cap; >=0.1 at >=5sigma across all 50 caps for clean F1, 0.025-0.1 sensitivity-limited, <0.025 not falsifying.
nv_center_chiral_proxy.mechanism: CISS-dependent protected-subspace Zeno lock; chirality requirement of GCT biophysics
nv_center_chiral_proxy.verdict_rule: F1 = joint Branch A + B null. Protocol A-Prime F1 is falsified only if BOTH no peak is detected in the Branch A 112 +/- 10 MHz window and no peak is detected in the Branch B 42 +/- 10 MHz window across the required 32-200 MHz scan with <=5 kHz spacing, S0-S7 acceptance checks, no 150 MHz anti-Zeno sign, no R-vs-S chirality contrast, measured pre-unblinding per-cap P_CISS, and post-transfer CISS retention on the h-BN/NV process flow meeting the clean-falsification floor. A single-branch null does not falsify. Peak-amplitude magnitude is O.23/O.24 readout context, not a falsification threshold.
nv_center_chiral_proxy.dataset: NV centres in diamond with controlled h-BN chirality capping
nv_center_chiral_proxy.priority: HIGH — non-biological validation of core CISS mechanism

directional_bell_inequality.mechanism: Anisotropic entanglement collapse due to 10 three-fold vacuum axes and c-anisotropy at phi^-18
directional_bell_inequality.alignment_mask: 15-angle icosahedral mask (identical to PTA l=6 prediction)
directional_bell_inequality.falsification: Isotropic Bell inequality violation across all baselines -> GCT excluded
